author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to see what is licensed and up to date.
cons: For large systems, BelManage on a stand alone basis provides marginal utility. The basic search functions are primitive. You need to purchase BelAnalytics to dig into the data and understand what you have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It fetches and stores all the data, for Purchase and Branch wise allocation of Licence options needs to be implemented.
author: Rajesh N.
pros: It stores and displays the licence keys of the software , which makes life easier to reconcile the Licenses.
cons: Reporting is not that great, if you want have a reconciled report, its not easily available. For the Purchase of licence there is no data entry module , you have to enter it in Excel, You dont have a option to Assign a specific licence to specific Branch or User Computer.

review_title: Great tool for the IT Toolbox
description: BelManage is my go to tool for quick information on deployed computers in or environments.
author: Todd G.
pros: Quick and easy to run reports. Easily exportable to Excel spreadsheet.
cons: Need more tools that map to the NIST 800-171 standard.

author: Hannah B.
pros: We like the ability for track our software licenses and check on how our hardware configurations for the purchasing of new products.
cons: The inability to take our MatLab licenses.

description: Overall my experience with Belmanage has been great as an administrator. I judge a company based on reaction time provided by the helpdesk when an issue does occur. Although Belmanage is not my patching solution as a reference it helps keep my systems in order and looks at other issues not commonly detected by patching solutions.
author: Wellington C.
pros: Our company had a requirement for license tracking. Belmanage meets that criteria and performs exactly as needed.
cons: Automated reports from belmanage would be more useful. Although this isnt the intended function for belmanage having a better UI when navigating through the menu does not create a "nice feel experience." Webpage customization would be nice and new interface face lift would be greatly appreciated.

author: rahsaan S.
pros: Its inventory methods of assets and managing the software in which Belmanage
cons: the update features and how often they occur

review_title: Useful Tool for Asset and Configuration Management
description: BelManage is used as a way to manage the IT assets of the company, see changes and for Configuration Management audits after releases.
author: Robert W.
pros: Belmanage provides a clear, concise, and easy to digest "list" to manage IT assets and licenses. It's output is simple to use and makes everyday management easy.
cons: There is a small amount of drain on the CPU of the system using the tool but it is minimal and has no effect when used in off-hours

review_title: Easy Way to Know What is in Each Machine!
description: Allow me to compare life cycle of various components.
author: Sheila B.
pros: Very easy way to keep track of software licenses on individual machines. Also easy to view details of equipment on machines.
cons: No cons for how I use it. I only want to view software licenses and hardware info.

review_title: Great Company and Partner to work with
description: We are Belarc's partner in Europe since 2015. We are very much impressed by the easy to use and full functional product Belmanage. Beside that they have a free personal version called Belarc Advisor. Their support is always friendly and adequate. It's a pleasure to work with them. We have created a webshop for the Belarc product: http://itamsoft.com/webshop-belarc. The free Belarc Advisor can be downloaded in our download center: http://itamsoft.com/download-center
author: Harry L.
